name: open-prose
description: Runs Markdown contracts as multi-agent programs.

interface.shortDescription: Run Markdown contracts as multi-agent programs.
interface.longDescription: OpenProse gives Codex a reusable workflow language for agent programs: contracts, services, wiring, state, and auditable run artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenProse to run this workflow as a reusable contract.
Use OpenProse to write a multi-agent program for this repeated process.
